description: سكريبت Playwright لجلب بيانات صفحة difrence food على فيسبوك
command_preview:
import asyncio, json, re
from playwright.async_api import async_playwright

async def scrape():
    results = {'page_name': 'difrence food', 'location': 'Oran, Algeria', 'type': 'Fast food restaurant', 'data': {}, 'errors': []}
    async with async_playwright() as p:
        browser = await p.chromium.launch(headless=True)

        page = await ctx.new_page()
